raw_comment: The US is using about 2x the energy per person as China and about 8x as India. It reflects the populations living in those countries with a standard of living similar to the US.  Green sources are increasing in all 3.  Coal is a substantial proportion of energy production.
ace_sentences: The US uses about 2x the energy per person as China.
The US uses about 8x the energy per person as India.
It reflects the populations living in those countries.
These populations have a standard of living similar to the US.
Green sources are increasing in the US.
Green sources are increasing in China.
Green sources are increasing in India.
Coal is a substantial proportion of energy production.
